source: Stage Two T3 covariates for the 2026 BDBV cross-border outbreak. Population density derived from public estimates (Ituri Province admin-2 figures plus Kampala 2024 census preliminary; Bundibugyo District UBOS 2022). Road connectivity index derived from OpenStreetMap arterial coverage and MoH district reports (1=isolated, 5=primary arterial city). Healthcare distance derived from MoH Ituri/Uganda reference-hospital lists. Conflict access score derived from ACLED political-violence intensity in Ituri (high; 4) and surrounding districts (1=peace, 5=no access).

geographies.derivation_notes: Ituri Province rural health zone, ~65/km² admin-3 estimate; secondary roads only; nearest reference hospital ~42km in Bunia. ACLED political-violence index high in 2024-2026.
Ituri mining-town health zone; mixed population including artisanal mining settlements; modest road connectivity; reference hospital ~28km. High ACLED political-violence intensity.

Ituri Province capital, urban center ~357k population in ~25km²; main arterial roads + airport; multiple reference facilities within 3km. Moderate ACLED political-violence at the city center; rising toward periphery.
Uganda capital ~1.65M in ~189km²; primary arterial network; multiple reference facilities <2km. Peacetime.
Bundibugyo District UBOS 2022 ~250k in ~2,338km²; secondary roads on Lake Albert escarpment; Bundibugyo District Hospital ~18km from typical centroid; cross-border ADF activity surfaces periodically.

Beni Territory North Kivu; mixed urban+rural ~230/km²; arterial road to Butembo + airport; Beni General Hospital within urban core; sustained ADF / armed-group violence makes contact-tracing infeasible in many areas.
Kasese District ~280/km²; cross-border to Beni via Mpondwe + Bwera; arterial road; Kilembe Mines Hospital + Kasese District Hospital.
Aggregate corridor wrapper for the BDBV 2026 cross-border corridor (used in Stage One fixture). Averages of constituent zones.
Default fallback for unspecified geographies. Mid-range values to avoid biasing the edge-weight modifier.
